jsonld.name: Meaning-Vertigo
jsonld.description: A state of processing where a single term reveals itself to operate according to multiple, incommensurable criteria of validity simultaneouslyâ€”such that no single framework can encompass all of them, yet all remain equally present and pressing. The experience is not confusion about which meaning is correct, but vertigo in the face of genuine multivalence.
